introSection: Draky is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SBF Visa Group currently located at Zoomarine in Pomezia, Lazio, Italy. It originally opened on 2 April 2011 as Squalotto.
fullText:
Draky is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer SBF Visa Group currently located at Zoomarine in Pomezia, Lazio, Italy. It originally opened on 2 April 2011 as Squalotto.

Standard Wacky Worm layout.
